venv-config.tips: When you deploy, it takes time to create or remove the Python virtual environment.
venv-config.alert-no-python: Python is not installed or not found in PATH. Virtual environment cannot be created.
venv-config.alert-no-venv: Python venv module is not installed. On Debian/Ubuntu, run: sudo apt install python3-venv
venv-config.alert-no-pip: Python pip is not available. On Debian/Ubuntu, run: sudo apt install python3-pip python3-venv
